chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated insurance technology companies providing certificate of insurance tracking, premium audits, specialty inspection services companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US). Exclude: MGA, managing general agents, MGU, managing general underwriters

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
[QA Bot] 29/30 candidates (96%) filtered as gov/nonprofit/public. Refining Apollo search parameters.
[QA Bot] 30/30 candidates (100%) failed AI relevance. Forcing search parameter pivot.

row.Description: Bolt is a digital insurance platform that provides comprehensive solutions for personal and commercial insurance distribution. It offers a range of services including embedded product choice, dynamic quoting, and data insights to streamline insurance operations and enhance customer experience.
row.Title: N/A
row.Latest News: Former Boise State football player faced litany of charges. He reached plea deal - Idaho Statesman | https://news.google.?oc=5
row._niche:
insurance technology companies providing certificate of insurance tracking, premium audits, specialty inspection services

EXCLUDE these types of companies: MGA, managing general agents, MGU, managing general underwriters
row.Conviction Pitch: Bolt is a digital insurance platform with high growth potential but lacks clear differentiation in the crowded InsurTech sector. It offers digital solutions for insurance distribution, but faces substantial competition without a unique competitive edge. This market is saturated with similar offerings, and there's no compelling 'right to win' factor to make it a standout candidate for us to pursue.
row.Conviction Reasoning: Limited differentiation and priority, coupled with strong competition, lead to a low conviction score.

near_misses.reason: Conviction 3/10: Limited differentiation and priority, coupled with strong competition, lead to a low conviction score.

row.Description: Injala is a company specializing in insurance technology solutions, offering a comprehensive suite of tools for risk management, insurance verification, and policy management, powered by artificial intelligence. They provide services such as business process automation, contractor financial prequalification, and safety inspections, primarily serving the insurance industry with a focus on enhancing operational efficiency.
row.Title: N/A
row._niche:
insurance technology companies providing certificate of insurance tracking, premium audits, specialty inspection services

EXCLUDE these types of companies: MGA, managing general agents, MGU, managing general underwriters
row.Conviction Pitch: Injala operates in the insurance technology space, providing AI-driven tools for risk management and operational efficiency. While they offer a comprehensive suite of services including insurance verification and policy management, their differentiation within the market is only medium, and they are not showing high growth or transaction readiness. The lack of a standout feature or clear competitive edge in a highly fragmented market diminishes their appeal.
row.Conviction Reasoning: Despite operating in an attractive sector with a focus on enhancing operational efficiency, Injala lacks a distinctive edge or compelling growth signal, which prevents it from standing out as a truly exciting investment opportunity.

near_misses.reason: Conviction 4/10: Despite operating in an attractive sector with a focus on enhancing operational efficiency, Injala lacks a distinctive edge or compelling growth signal, which prevents it from standing out as a truly exciting investment opportunity.
